title: Loom planning-pack manifest (frontmatter)
description: Machine-checkable shape of plans/MANIFEST.md frontmatter. Body sections per templates/pack/MANIFEST.md.

tier.description: S packs normally don't exist (single WO instead); if one does, it must say why.

status.description: Pack-level status. 'stale' = a pack-wide staleness trigger fired (loom/execution/staleness.md); individual artifacts carry their own status per loom/planning/plan-authoring.md.

loom_version.description: Loom version that produced the pack (CHANGELOG.md) — makes stale guidance traceable.

repo_head.description: Commit hash at last survey; staleness rechecks diff against it. Absent only when no repo exists yet.
